generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 3D environmental mapping and object detection using point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual perception and object tracking using RGB-D data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraRGBDData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensors integrated into lower-level chassis for speed and steering angle measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for environmental mapping"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraRGBDData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "RGB-D data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data including speed and steering angle from onboard sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based clustering model for processing raw LiDAR point cloud data into object clusters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based tracking model for maintaining object state estimates from clustered point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) logic for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Intermediate object tracks generated after point cloud clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, CameraRGBDData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks containing position, velocity, and size information from detected objects"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesDatabaseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data stored in SQL database for reporting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing raw LiDAR point clouds using DBSCAN clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectDetectionService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for maintaining object state estimates using Kalman filters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for offloading ACC computation logic from vehicle to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for collecting and storing ego vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom enabler for serializing data, aligning message types, and performing unit conversions between systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for generating human-readable time-series reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance ROS2CommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware enabler for onboard component communication using ROS2 network"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ObjectTrackingService
]

instance WiFiCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Networking enabler for inter-entity communication using Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service for ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathProjectionInsight
]

instance ObjectDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting and clustering objects from raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectDetectionInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for maintaining object state estimates using Kalman filters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing ISO 15622 compliant ACC logic for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling remote enabling/disabling of ACC, setting desired speed, and sending emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlInsight, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected objects with position, velocity, and size information"
]

instance DrivingPathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of vehicle's intended driving path based on current state and ACC logic"
]

instance ObjectDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Clustered object detection results from raw LiDAR point clouds"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Maintained object state estimates with position, velocity, and size information"
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance metrics of ACC system including speed adjustment and lead vehicle distance"
]

instance RemoteControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Remote control interface status including ACC enable/disable state and desired speed"
]

instance PerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable time-series reports of vehicle performance and object interactions"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command issued from User Entity to Actuation Functional Entity"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation system for speed control using Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed commands to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation system for directional control interfaced with lower-level chassis"
]

// C1: Environment and Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosting actuation components and data pre-processing functionality"
    base:contains MotorActuationComponent, SteeringServoActuationComponent, VehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosting ACC logic, data collection, and storage services"
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ACCControlModel, DataCollectionEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity hosting visualization and control interfaces"
    base:contains RealTimeMonitoringEnabler, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ThreeDEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Environment for real-time monitoring of vehicle state and object tracks"
    base:contains RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathProjectionInsight
]

instance ControlPanelEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Control Panel Environment for remote management of ACC system"
    base:contains RemoteControlInsight, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
    - **Remote management commands** (e.g., enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) sent from the **User Entity** (via **Control Panel**) to the **Digital Twin Entity**.
    - **ACC control logic** executed in the **Controlling FE**, which computes the desired speed based on the lead vehicle's distance and sends it back to the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity**.
    - **Actuation commands** (motor voltage and steering adjustments) executed on the vehicle's onboard hardware (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at a **real-time scale** with the following constraints:
    - **End-to-end latency** between the vehicle and DT must not exceed **100 ms** (as per **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for V2V communication).
    - **Clock synchronization** between components must be accurate to **±100 ms** (due to hardware limitations).
    The DT services (e.g., ACC computation, visualization) are synchronized with the PT's operational time to ensure low-latency decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **ISO 23247-based architecture** with the following orchestration:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **actuation (motor/steering)** and **data pre-processing (LiDAR/camera)**.
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosts **ACC logic (Controlling FE)**, **data collection (Data Collecting FE)**, **report generation (Reporting FE)**, and **data storage (SQL database)**.
    - **User Entity**: Hosts **3D Visualization (User Interface FE)** and **Control Panel (User Interface FE)**.
    - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication.
    The system is deployed across **three hardware layers**: onboard vehicle (Jetson Orin Nano), external cloud/edge (for DT services), and user interface (remote workstation)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is primarily used during the **Operation phase** of the vehicle lifecycle, supporting:
    - **Real-time monitoring and remote management** of the **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC)** system.
    - **Development and troubleshooting** by developers, leveraging data collection and visualization capabilities to debug and optimize the system.
    The DTS is not explicitly designed for **design-phase validation** (e.g., CAD-based simulation) or **predictive maintenance** (e.g., CREO Simulate integration), though these are mentioned in related work. The twinning focuses on **as-operated** representations, with real-time synchronization to the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Real-time synchronization** with **±100 ms clock accuracy** and **≤100 ms end-to-end latency**.
    - **Validation against ISO 15622** for ACC performance class I compliance.
    - **Data integrity mechanisms** in the **Data Translation FE** (e.g., unit conversions, message alignment).
    - **Uncertainty management**: Kalman filters for object tracking and **DBSCAN** for robust point cloud clustering.
    - **Verification**: Publicly available **source code** and **demonstration** for reproducibility and third-party validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
    - **Network Protocols**:
        - **ROS2** for onboard communication between sensors, actuators, and software components.
        - **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (Physical Twin Entity ↔ Digital Twin Entity ↔ User Entity).
    - **Data Formats**: Custom serialization and unit conversion via the **Data Translation FE**.
    - **Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms** end-to-end latency (as per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** onboard the vehicle.
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware** (cloud/edge) for computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Deployed on a **remote workstation** for visualization and control.
    - **Data Storage**: External **SQL database** for storing time-series data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows the following standards:
    - **ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, Part 2)** for the reference architecture and entity-based design.
    - **ISO 15622** for ACC performance class I compliance.
    - **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for V2V communication latency requirements (≤100 ms).
    - **ROS2** for middleware standardization in onboard communication.
    - **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK** for hardware-specific standardization."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
    - **Low-latency requirements** (≤100 ms) to ensure real-time operation and safety-critical responses (e.g., emergency braking).
    - **Clock synchronization** (±100 ms) for event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems.
    - **Remote management safeguards**: User commands (e.g., emergency braking) are validated before execution.
    - **Data integrity**: The **Data Translation FE** ensures consistent data formats and unit conversions.
    - **Safety-critical operation**: The DT is classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (per **David and Bork taxonomy**), where humans monitor but do not directly control safety-critical actions."
]
